item.title: Depression
item.description: (Image taken from the interweb, original source unknown.) US Suicide Prevention Call or text: 800-273-8255 or 988 More info or chat online: https://suicidepreventionlifeline.org/ American Foundation for Suicide Prevention Www.afsp.org Great information & resources regarding depression (has been really beneficial to me): https://thedepressionproject.com/ Anxiety and Depression Association of America: https://adaa.org/understanding-anxiety Informational post by @Eindride, @DrivebyPianist Imgur people to talk to, resources, etc : http://imgur.com/gallery/xZiVRmo Need a safe place to be open with your mental health? Join Discord, Need to talk: https://discord.gg/gWDbZCbErQ Wholesome Discord run by @ryanjoseph666 https://discord.gg/FUbc4r5zFk

item.title: Even more evil than thought..
item.description: #ukraine #ukraine_conflict #fuckputin #stop_the_war If this comes out to be true it is even more disgusting than I thought it would become.. Non of them are even living in Russia, they are all from east Ukraine (occupied Donbas region). Saw comments about interviews from AlJazeera with women in the occupied parts that say there are no man left, all of them are taken to “military training”. It’s not just Slavic brother folks.. Ukrainians are forced by Russia to kill Ukrainians. I haven’t found any legit confirmation about that but it shows: don’t judge a book by it’s cover! We don’t know what’s going on exactly. Just that not Russia or the Russian people are the foe, it’s only War-Criminal Putin!! Hope he get buried in history books soon! If you want to help: https://imgur.com/gallery/44cHnBX SLAVA UKRAINI! Full video: https://www.reddit.com/r/UkrainianConflict/comments/t4v1l5/god_have_mercy_these_are_not_even_soldiers/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=ios_app&utm_name=iossmf

item.title: Well said.
item.dc:creator: BluesFish

item.title: He is a nice guy for sure and good role model for me.
item.description: It still blows my mind how many people think that I am Mark. It's happened plenty before. See for yourself...https://youtu.be/Imto3sO88Mc. and the story that goes with it... https://www.ocregister.com/2019/07/20/mark-hamill-lookalike-fluke-skywalker-blows-minds-at-comic-con-as-star-wars-fans-press-in-for-photos/amp/ EDIT - Most Viral? Heck yeah! Thank you my dudes. On another note, I can't thank you all enough for being so kind to me and saying such nice things. The Imgur community is the most kind and generous community out of all of the social media that I am on. From my first visit to the Ronald McDonald House in 2017 at Christmas time to the toy drive I did on Giving Tuesday last November, you guys have been with me all the way and have been totally supportive. I can't tell you how much it means to me that you are helping so many little kids who are really experiencing one of the worst times in their life. Your generosity gets them a new Star Wars toy and they forget about the pain for a while. You all turn tears into laughter. Kids that were in the room only a few minutes before upset, sick and scared become a whole different person when they get a lightsaber in their hands or a Grogu to keep.(Kids love beating the hell out of each other with lightsabers. LOL) Remember how much it meant to you when you were little kid and someone was very kind to you and surprised you with a new toy? That's how they feel. I can't do this level of giving without all of you. I can't thank you enough and I genuinely love you guys for your generosity and the fact you care about other human beings that you don't know and will never meet. You all deserve all of the credit in my opinion. My job is just to buy the toys and take them there and interact with the kids whenever possible. I truly don't think of myself as anything more than a Dad from Cincinnati, who volunteers to help out charities. Thanks again and may the force be with you!

item.title: Omg! Such trash!

item.dc:creator: SisterMidnight

item.title: Autumn
item.description: Post FP & Accolade Award Edit: I worked with a friend 16 yrs who jumps this way. Wasn't just me. Anyone any approach if he's focused. He doesn't know why he does it. He used to be bummed out about it but now just apologizes to others because he knows they dread approaching him. Now, I have no idea if this young lady has the same issue. It looks like the guy actively scares her sometimes. Other times it's obvious she just reacts instinctively this way (parking lot). All I can say is I thought of my close friend when I saw this video. He would think it's hilarious. So I posted it. Please chill out in his honor. Or at least reconsider whether there's real trauma behind why she reacts this way. Finally Thank You! For the Accolade Award. I hope this made a lot more people smile than frown. I joined Imgur to help people get thru their days, not to add more burden.
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: A very powerful image.
item.description: During WWII, Jews in Budapest were brought to the edge of the Danube, ordered to remove their shoes, and shot, falling into the water below. 60 pairs of iron shoes now line the river's bank, a ghostly memorial to the victims. 'Shoes on the Danube Promenade' by Can Togay and Gyula Pauer. Photo: Nikodem Nijaki Source: All About Cemeteries
item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: Desperately wanting to know wtf the BOFA joke is. May the Memery unloading commence.
item.description:
It's true. I live in Texas, and have finally shooed the snow away... For now...
No ma'am- you better go drop them babies back off at public school right now
He's beauty, he's grace
Pretty sure this means that masks are actually just facial hymens. Right on.
This ad for herpes
*getting them all well acquainted with that r/antiwork mentality*
WHAT'S THE BOFA JOKE? Can I plz know?
This rude ass creep in Pogo
& this spinner was legit right down the street from Poltergeist Clock
Could not get this pic any more clear, so hopefully y'all can zoom in well enough :)
Oh, this is just my beloved baby angel girl: Halo
